title: Ionic Money - Rekt
relevance_summary: Fake collateral deployment followed by flash loan and withdrawal on DeFi protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints new tokens and immediately borrows large amounts in the same transaction.

red_flags: Large amount of tokens minted and immediately borrowed
summary: Ionic Money was defrauded via a fake LBTC token deployment, which was immediately used to mint and borrow large sums of value, ultimately leading to a significant loss. A guard could have detected this by blocking any transaction that mints new tokens and immediately borrows large amounts in the same transaction.
